mapper.select: SELECT CD as cd, UP_CD as upCd, CD_NM as cdNm, CD_LVL as cdLvl, USE_YN as useYn, CD_ORD as cdOrd, REF_CD1 as refCd1, REF_CD2 as refCd2, REF_CD3 as refCd3, REF_CD4 as refCd4, REF_CD5 as refCd5, REF_NUM1 as refNum1, REF_NUM2 as refNum2, REF_NUM3 as refNum3, REF_NUM4 as refNum4, REF_NUM5 as refNum5, CD_RMK as cdRmk, TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS crtAt, TO_CHAR(UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updAt FROM CMS_COM_CODE WHERE UP_CD = #{upCd} ORDER BY CD_ORD ASC

SELECT CD as cd, UP_CD as upCd, CD_NM as cdNm, CD_LVL as cdLvl, USE_YN as useYn, CD_ORD as cdOrd, REF_CD1 as refCd1, REF_CD2 as refCd2, REF_CD3 as refCd3, REF_CD4 as refCd4, REF_CD5 as refCd5, REF_NUM1 as refNum1, REF_NUM2 as refNum2, REF_NUM3 as refNum3, REF_NUM4 as refNum4, REF_NUM5 as refNum5, CD_RMK as cdRmk, TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS crtAt, TO_CHAR(UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updAt FROM CMS_COM_CODE WHERE CD = #{cd} AND UP_CD = #{upCd}
mapper.update:
UPDATE CMS_COM_CODE SET CD_NM = #{vo.cdNm}, USE_YN = #{vo.useYn}, CD_ORD = #{vo.cdOrd}, REF_CD1 = #{vo.refCd1}, REF_CD2 = #{vo.refCd2}, REF_CD3 = #{vo.refCd3}, REF_CD4 = #{vo.refCd4}, REF_CD5 = #{vo.refCd5}, REF_NUM1 = #{vo.refNum1}, REF_NUM2 = #{vo.refNum2}, REF_NUM3 = #{vo.refNum3}, REF_NUM4 = #{vo.refNum4}, REF_NUM5 = #{vo.refNum5}, CD_RMK = #{vo.cdRmk},
WHERE CD = #{cd} AND UP_CD = #{upCd}
